reviews.quote: Within just one month of deployment, DocsBot successfully handled over 30,000 customer inquiries, demonstrating its ability to handle a high volume of interactions. The chatbot achieved an impressive resolution rate of approximately 80%.
reviews.author: NURO Hikari

reviews.quote: DocsBot has perfectly understood our needs in AI bot operations and is adding new features at an incredible speed. We are truly grateful for this wonderful partnership!
reviews.author: Yukitoshi Aoyagi

reviews.quote: Really excited to see what this can do for WordPress support. The chat responses are already saving us time, I'm looking forward to getting it integrated with Help Scout as well. Very promising, worth a watch!
reviews.author: Jack Arturo
reviews.role: Founder and CEO of Very Good Plugins

reviews.quote: DocsBot has become an essential part of my courses, assisting students with assignments, exams, and projects, while reinforcing key concepts from our lecture discussions.
reviews.author: Brian D. Avery

reviews.quote: The ability to train the bot on your own content library in really intuitive ways sets DocsBot apart. Love it!
reviews.author: Matt Cromwell

reviews.quote: DocsBot is amazing! I want to thank you for your great work on this product. I have tried a few others, and nothing compares.
reviews.author: Gareth P.

reviews.quote: We've been using DocsBot for just over a week now, and I'm really loving it. We have an AI assistant integrated on our website, and also a bot assisting our human support team answer support emails via Help Scout.
reviews.author: Simon

reviews.quote: DocsBot has helped us improve our communication to our customers and stakeholders.
reviews.author: Anders

reviews.quote: I have been using DocsBot for my business self-service and it sure works well, and I really recommend it.
reviews.author: Musa Sithole

reviews.quote: Since the bikes are sold online and need to be assembled and maintained by the customer, we needed a support solution to help our customers 24/7 that was easy to deploy and scalable. DocsBot could train on our multilingual user manuals and the website.
reviews.author: Sanchay Roy

reviews.quote: Absolutely loved the summary of YouTube videos. Saved a lot of my time.
reviews.author: Amol Parikh

reviews.quote: We've integrated DocsBot into our travel industry training platform since September 2023 and it has helped our community access the information they need to help convert enquiries into bookings. It's a great tool, very easy to integrate and maintain.
reviews.author: Russell

reviews.quote: We were invested in building our own RAG, but the ease of use of your service made me stop our efforts, even though we're all technical people here! Good job.
reviews.author: Geovanny Tejeda

reviews.quote: It's an amazing tool to create your own AI bot that will give answers based on your training materials; you can train this bot to answer your common queries.
reviews.author: Gobinda Tarafdar

reviews.quote: This is a very natural application for AI... saving on frontline customer support... I think the AI will do a really good job eliminating level one, it'll start to eating into level two.
reviews.author: David Sacks

reviews.quote: We've had DocsBot on our docs site for the last couple of months and our users are definitely engaging with it. It's been a great tool for understanding what our users are interested in learning from our docs!
reviews.author: Liza Mock

reviews.quote: We're using it for our product Dollie, to index our knowledge base and our site to provide first line of support for our customers and help them get started faster with our product using the embedded widget.
reviews.author: Bowe Frankema

reviews.quote: In my experience, it's about 60 percent in terms of giving a really good answer. That's not to say it isn't incredible, because it is, and DocsBot still saves us a ton of time.
reviews.author: Zach Katz

reviews.quote: We've been testing DocsBot and the results are really quite impressive. The answer isn't in our docs, but DocsBot did great!
reviews.author: Steve Burge

reviews.quote: Over 90% of chatbot queries originated from agents JPA developed, reducing the need for direct human interaction and streamlining internal decision-making.
reviews.author: JPA Health
